name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Did you see me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
I've been busy these last few months--I've been traveling all around the United States to share our shared progressive vision for the future. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377175d/691c9bd/6d2bb1ce/11a47770/763866715/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

I've been busy these last few months--I've been traveling all around the United States to share our shared progressive vision for the future.

Just this morning I was on _The View_. In case you missed it, you can still**[**_watch a clip here:_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-theview?refcode=em_fr_20190719_JH_20190719-fr-JH-viewrecap-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-theview?refcode=em_fr_20190719_JH_20190719-fr-JH-viewrecap-all_all_i1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I used this opportunity to talk about what our campaign is really about: Achieving progressive goals. And I have the experience to do so. **In fact, I 've successfully implemented these policies on a city and state level--something no other candidate in this race can say.**

But despite my experience, the other candidates have something that our campaign needs: the resources to amplify their message.

**Getting our vision out to the American people takes money.** That's what I'm really asking for when I ask for your donation--help hiring staff who can make our message louder. Funding to train the volunteers who will knock on doors for this campaign. A few dollars towards setting up our next meet-and-greets with voters in early primary states. And of course, help qualifying for the next debate.

[**_So watch me on _The View_ here. And if you share my vision for a progressive future, chip in any amount to help make that vision a reality._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-theview?refcode=em_fr_20190719_JH_20190719-fr-JH-viewrecap-all_all_l2&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Giddy up,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-theview?refcode=em_fr_20190719_JH_20190719-fr-JH-viewrecap-all_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: ALERT (via Team Baer)
subject: ALERT: Mike Pence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
Mike Pence is coming to Colorado to prop up Cory Gardner.
|
---

| | We just got lousy news: Trump's VP Mike Pence is flying to Colorado in 48 hours to prop up Dan's Republican opponent, Cory Gardner.

**[Will you chip in $15 right now to fight back against Trump enablers like Mike Pence and Republicans like Cory Gardner who refuse to stand up to Donald Trump? >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265b/232dfd1/9accc40/62a1114f/1975454289/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=201907019_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=15&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

Just last week--after the press reported Dan's "jaw-dropping $1.35 million in fundraising" in his first quarter--a news headline announced:
## _**" Colorado's most antigay Republican senator just got an openly gay Democratic challenger."**_
Clearly, Gardner was unnerved. How did he respond? The same way he always does - by calling in favors from his corporate donors and political allies. In this case, he's called in Vice President Mike Pence.
Pence has a long history of supporting anti-LGBTQ policy and legislation. So it's no surprise that Gardner--who campaigned on his opposition to marriage equality and has done nothing to stop the onslaught of anti-LGBTQ Trump policies attacking our troops and healthcare access--calls on his buddy Mike Pence when he feels threatened by Dan's formidable campaign to flip the Senate. This is just the beginning. Mike Pence. Corporate PAC money. The NRA. Support from the Koch Brothers. All of these forces are already funneling money into Colorado to prop up Gardner and attack Dan. You can bet that Dan is going to fight back. He's been fighting back his entire career. When Putin's regime pushed anti-woman and anti-LGBTQ rhetoric to try to evade their human rights obligations, Dan took them to task. When the Russians tried to silence and undermine Dan by singling him out for being gay, he used it against them. (There's no angrier diplomat than a homophobic Russian ambassador who gets outmaneuvered by a young, gay American Ambassador!) But for this fight, he needs your help. In response to Mike Pence's visit to raise big bucks for Cory Gardner, we want to fight back with a bunch of grassroots donations. **[Will you chip in $15 dollars today to fight back against the anti-LGBTQ agenda of Mike Pence and his Senate lacky Cory Gardner? >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265b/232dfd1/9accc40/62a1114f/1975454289/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=201907019_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=15&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**

Thanks so much to all of you who have already given - it means the world to Dan (he sees every single donation!) and our entire campaign.

Thanks!
\--Team Baer
|
---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265b/232dfd1/9accc40/62a1114c/1975454289/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265b/232dfd1/9accc40/62a1114d/1975454289/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. We need your help to win -- and grassroots donations like yours truly make the difference. | | [**DONATE**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265b/232dfd1/9accc40/62a11172/1975454289/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=footer&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")

We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb8265b/232dfd1/9accc40/62a11170/1975454289/VEsB/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: We made history...
body:
** Good morning Peter,
------------------------------------------------------------
On this day, fifty years ago, the world watched as America made history. On this day, fifty years ago, we reached for that which was beyond our grasp, and we took it for our own. On this day fifty years ago, we put a man on the moon.

In September of 1962, John F. Kennedy stood at Rice University, and told the world that by the end of the decade, we would put a man on the moon. We would do this, he said, not because it was easy, but because it was hard. (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ouRbkBAOGEw&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=3011a56d00-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_07_20_04_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-3011a56d00-32267927)

As we move forward, looking into a future that may seem bleak and obsolete, it is imperative that we carry with us the same optimism - the same hope - that our predecessors possessed. It is essential that we never cease to aspire to greatness, that we never stop trying to reach the unreachable, to obtain the unobtainable.

There is nothing which exceeds our grasp, so long as we dare to hope, and believe in something greater than ourselves. As we commemorate this monumental day, I invite you all to stand with me in doing something greater. If you feel so inclined, please donate $3 today (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=3011a56d00-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_07_20_04_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-3011a56d00-32267927) , and help me clear my own hurdle, in my efforts to be elected to Congress.
Donate $3 today! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=3011a56d00-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_07_20_04_37&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-3011a56d00-32267927)
Thank you for your support! Let's face the possibilities of the future together.

Marc Flores

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Climate change is real, and here in Kentucky, we need an all-of-the-above energy policy to tackle it.
|
---

| | | **Andy Beshear 's
Kentucky Energy Survey**

_6 Questions
3 Minutes to Complete
Survey for: dpwillis67@gmail.com_ | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b3b/ad6dc73/1556d213/db4021d/2474936146/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/G9QMFJZ")**
---

Peter,

Climate change is real, and here in Kentucky, we need an all-of-the-above energy policy to tackle it. But at the same time, one of the biggest challenges facing Kentucky families is that **energy bills are going up** while good jobs are hard to find and wages remain flat, especially in rural Kentucky.

Families shouldn't have to choose between putting food on the table and paying utility bills, but unfortunately that's a decision too many are being forced to make. That's why **as attorney general, Andy has opposed dozens of utility bill hikes and helped save Kentucky families and businesses nearly $1.6 billion.**

Andy has a record of success preventing utility bill hikes, and **he'll keep working to lower energy bills for our families as governor, including by changing the rules to favor us, not the utility companies**. But if he's going to beat Matt Bevin in November and win this race, he needs to hear directly from Kentuckians on the issue, too.

[**So Peter, will you take Andy's Kentucky Energy Survey and let him know what you think about rising utility bills and what should be done to lower them for our families?**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b3b/ad6dc73/1556d213/db4021d/2474936146/VEsE/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/G9QMFJZ")

Thanks,
Team Beshear

This is the earliest a GOP presidential campaign has put staff on the ground in Minnesota in recent memory. They're preparing to open offices across the state and have already hosted a series of trainings to mobilize Republican voters.

**This is unprecedented and very concerning, which is why I 'm reaching out personally. The truth is we're at serious risk of losing this race if we don't see a surge in fundraising. We need to raise over $22,000 from this grassroots team before the end of July to stay on track.**

**[Will you make a contribution right now to stop the GOP from turning Minnesota red? Every single dollar you give helps us stand up to the GOP's growing infrastructure and build our team.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july2019?refcode=rtw_20190720_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

I know much of the country is focused on the presidential primary right now -- but if we lose sight of this critical race, we'll lose our chance at taking back the U.S. Senate. I'm counting on you to step up now.

Mike is not giving up on the fight to ensure migrants - especially children - are treated with the dignity and respect they deserve. [Are you with him? > Peter - Last week, I had the opportunity to visit the southern border amidst the ongoing humanitarian crisis. The reports of the horrific conditions that child migrants are being kept in are unfortunately correct.
>
> It is simply unacceptable that the Trump administration has made migrants go without a shower or a place to sleep for days at a time. This inhumane treatment cannot stand.
>

body:
On July 20, 1969, man took his first steps on the moon—a goal that President John F. Kennedy set less than a decade before but never lived to see. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d1b6bab434&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**_50 Years After Americans First Walked on the Moon, It’s Time for Another ‘Giant Leap’ for Mankind_**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=544a67ddbc&e=3ee4985eea)
-_WhiteHouse.gov_
On July 20, 1969, man took his first steps on the moon—a goal that President John F. Kennedy set less than a decade before but never lived to see. President Donald J. Trump has committed to putting Americans back on the Moon by 2024, establishing a human presence there by 2028, and charting a path for the eventual exploration of Mars from there.
---
|
---
| [**Nearly Two Dozen MS-13 Members From Central America Charged For Horrifying Murders in 'Sanctuary' California**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=393b39bef3&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Townhall_
“The Department of Justice announced the arrest of nearly two dozen MS-13 gang members this week who are connected to horrific murders carried out in California,” Katie Pavlich writes. Of the 22 individuals charged, 19 were in the United States illegally. “California, a sanctuary state that refuses to work with Immigration and Customs enforcement, protected them.”

**President Trump:**[My Administration “is taking care of these thugs now!”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ac09ee582&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Bullet-Riddled U.S. Flag that Survived D-Day Comes Home 75 years Later**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=48b2ba9c6e&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Reuters_
“Shot through by German machine gun bullets and tattered by the wind, an American flag that flew on the first U.S. invading ship on D-Day came home on Thursday in a White House ceremony,” Steve Holland reports. “The flag handover was a main part of the visit to the White House by Mark Rutte, prime minister of the Netherlands, who held Oval Office talks with President Donald Trump.”

**In photos** : [A beautiful piece of history ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7755f8c73b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Admin Tackles Rising Anti-Semitism**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1fa0f69ec5&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Free Beacon_
“The Trump administration is working on multiple fronts to investigate and combat a rising tide of anti-Semitism in America that top officials warned is spreading across the country via a network of far left, anti-Israel activists, who seek to mainstream hatred against Jews at the nation's college campuses and elsewhere,” Adam Kredo reports.

** ****Watch:** [America is one “squad” under God](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=39cda182e5&e=3ee4985eea)[ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8767a960ad&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Vice President Pence: Congress Must Pass the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28f0fa7d1b&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Post_
“Leaders on both sides of the aisle in Congress have long recognized the failures of the trade deal the USMCA will replace: the North American Free Trade Agreement,” the Vice President writes. “That outdated trade deal has hurt middle-class Americans, stifled innovation and left entire communities shuttered as jobs and opportunity have moved south of the border.”
---
|
---
| [**Peter Navarro: President Trump Continues to Deliver on his Promise to ‘Buy American, Hire American’**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e88c200032&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
This week, President Trump issued an executive order that requires Federal agencies to buy domestic iron, steel, and other materials for projects including airports, roads, and bridges, White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes. “Buy American federal procurement rules provide good manufacturing jobs at good wages, propelling more workers into middle-class prosperity.”

**🎬****Watch:** [The 3rd annual “Made in America Showcase” at the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2330b4ddfe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Drug Overdose Deaths Drop in U.S. for First Time Since 1990**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=114a2d4b68&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The New York Times_
“Three decades of ever-escalating deaths from drug overdoses in the United States may have come to an end . . . Total drug overdose deaths in America declined by around 5 percent last year, the first drop since 1990,” _The New York Times_ reports. “The decline was due almost entirely to a dip in deaths from prescription opioid painkillers.” President Trump declared the opioid epidemic a national public health emergency in 2017.
---
|
---
| [**President Trump's Asylum Action Will Help Ease the Border Crisis**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d60a565566&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“This week, the Trump administration continued its efforts to bring order to the southern border by imposing new rules on the asylum-seeking process,” the _Washington Examiner_ editorial board writes. Under the new rule, an alien who enters or attempts to enter the United States across the southern border, but who passed through other countries en route without applying for protections, will be ineligible for asylum here.

name: Tulsi Gabbard
subject: I am joining the protests in Puerto Rico
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TULSI NOW ]
body:
--TULSI 2020--

Friend—

Yesterday, I touched down in San Juan to stand with hundreds of thousands of protesters calling on Puerto Rico Governor Ricardo Rosselló to resign.

Thousands of people have been protesting nonstop for a week now. And the only responses they’ve gotten are dismissive platitudes from the Governor ignoring their cries for an end to corruption.

These protests are about so much more than offensive language in leaked chats. They’re about more than the Governor and his associates’ elitist attitudes. They’re about rampant corruption within Puerto Rico’s government that pretends to serve the interests of its people but instead exploits them , over and over again for profits and power. It is this blatant corruption that undermines people's faith in our democracy, our country and our values.

Puerto Rico is an example of how decades of neglect by those in power, who put their own selfish interests ahead of the well-being of the people, and who put profits and politics ahead of the needs of its citizens, erodes faith in our democracy and causes widespread suffering. This isn’t something people only experience in Puerto Rico. Across the country, we share their sense of injustice. We know what it feels like for our voices to go unheard — in San Juan, on Wall Street and in Washington D.C.

That’s why I’m here to support the people taking action to end a multibillion-dollar corruption network involving kickbacks for lobbyists and state officials, preferential government contracts and use of public resources to do partisan work.

I’m here to stand with my fellow Americans in Puerto Rico calling for the resignation of a corrupt Governor who has shown he is for himself, rather than for the people. I call on every Democratic candidate running for President to come here and stand with our fellow Americans in Puerto Rico against corruption.

I’m here to stand with my fellow Americans in Puerto Rico here on American soil demanding change. I stand with the people of Puerto Rico who love our country, who have sacrificed for our country and our people. Who have fought for our civil rights, and who I served alongside in Iraq. Who have put their lives on the line to serve our country. I stand with these great patriots and the people of Puerto Rico who deserve a government of the people, by the people, and for the people.

With love of country,
Tulsi

Friend,

But despite my experience, the other candidates have something that our campaign needs: the resources to amplify their message.

**Getting our vision out to the American people takes money.** That's what I'm really asking for when I ask for your donation--help hiring staff who can make our message louder. subject: Admiral Joe Sestak's opinion piece on Iranian tensions in the Des Moines Register: Militaries can stop a problem, but they won't fix a problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
_JOE ON THE ISSUES_

# Admiral Joe Sestak's opinion piece on Iranian tensions in the Des Moines Register: _Militaries can stop a problem, but they won't fix a problem_

I wanted to share my latest opinion piece with you - where I talk about the Iran nuclear deal and the tensions in the Persian Gulf. You can find it [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8420971/81410932/654585162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ1ZmRiOC00MmFiLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9vVDvoi4LyKdEWSErYTvNobqJlld4PGmU5yxAng-ARk=), in the Des Moines Register.

An extract:
_Tensions between Iran and the United States have recently reached dangerous new heights — which could result in spiraling reprisals devolving into war. _
_Having served in the military, I know that militaries can stop a problem, but they can’t fix a problem. This is why I supported the Iran nuclear accord, and still support it today as the best framework for maintaining peace and security for us and our allies. As tensions continue to ratchet up, we must own up to the fact that we are to blame. We broke our word..._
_...The Iran deal was working. As a solution to the problem of Iran developing nuclear weapons, it was actually working quite well. We need to return to the negotiating table. Diplomacy fixed this problem before. Diplomacy can do it again._
Read more [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8420972/81410933/654585162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ1ZmRiOC00MmFiLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9vVDvoi4LyKdEWSErYTvNobqJlld4PGmU5yxAng-ARk=).
You can also learn more about my foreign policy philosophy [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8420973/81410934/1908175313?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ1ZmRiOC00MmFiLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9vVDvoi4LyKdEWSErYTvNobqJlld4PGmU5yxAng-ARk=), and why I believe America must regain its leadership position and convene the world to tackle the world's biggest challenges, from China to climate change, to protect our American dream at home.

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.
Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a830f586-41ab-e911-bcd0-281878391efb/9145fdb8-42ab-e911-bcd0-281878391efb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTQ1ZmRiOC00MmFiLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9vVDvoi4LyKdEWSErYTvNobqJlld4PGmU5yxAng-ARk=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I’ll be on the stage for the next Democratic debate on Wednesday, July 31, facing off against Joe Biden, Cory Booker, and more.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
Now that our team knows which night I’ll take the stage for the July debate, it’s time to get to work. Each debate is a new opportunity for our people-powered campaign to reach millions more undecided voters across the country -- and to contrast our message and platform with those of our opponents. In the coming days, my team and I are set to dig in deep on debate preparation so we’re ready for anything that comes our way. But before we start, I need your help: **[Will you take a moment to share the top 3 issues you want to hear about during the upcoming July debate? Fill out this quick survey and add your thoughts »](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-july-debate-survey?refcode=ema190720-full&source=ema190720-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1&akid=5626%2E5755789%2EGTMiYH)** | | [ Take the survey ](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-july-debate-survey?refcode=ema190720-full&source=ema190720-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&akid=5626%2E5755789%2EGTMiYH)
---
You are the voice of our movement. That’s why I reach out every so often to ask for your input and thoughts.
As the news cycle and political climate rapidly change with each passing day, I rely on hearing directly from you and supporters like you across the country to speak truth about the issues that matter most.
**The upcoming July debate is an opportunity to amplify real solutions for every American -- no matter who you are or where you live. Your input matters a great deal.**
**[Click here to fill out our brief July debate survey and let me know what’s on your mind.](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-july-debate-survey?refcode=ema190720-full&source=ema190720-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=3&akid=5626%2E5755789%2EGTMiYH)**
Thanks for all you do.
For The People,
— Kamala Harris
| [ Take the survey ](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-july-debate-survey?refcode=ema190720-full&source=ema190720-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=4&akid=5626%2E5755789%2EGTMiYH)
---

| Team Bennet,

It's been quite a month for Team Bennet. And the biggest moment yet is just 11 days away.

Our grassroots campaign is growing every day, as Michael travels across the country talking to voters.

Millions of Americans will watch the July 31st debate and hear Michael share his vision for the future. You can help us build momentum and spread Michael's message by inviting your friends to watch with you.

[We built a step-by-step toolkit so you can host your own July debate watch party. Click here to join us:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbad6f/134673f2/ff1561f/69969c05/6394919/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://michaelbennet.com/July31DebateWatchParty?source=EM_PET_B2_072019_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

body:

---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce09/3eb3e2fc/59f4f72c/744a5e08/1913296698/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20190720_em_org_vol-launch&source=20190720_em_org_vol-launch")
---
| | A campaign is only as strong as its volunteers. (We're not just saying that -- experts say it too!) **So, are YOU ready to show the country how strong Team Juli an really is?** [Come join our movement and become a volunteer!](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce09/3eb3e2fc/59f4f72c/744a5e77/1913296698/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://julianforthefuture.com/volunteer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Come+join+our+movement+and+become+a+volu&utm_campaign=20190720_em_org_vol-launch&source=20190720_em_org_vol-launch") [**I'M READY**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce09/3eb3e2fc/59f4f72c/744a5e76/1913296698/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://julianforthefuture.com/volunteer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+IM+READY&utm_campaign=20190720_em_org_vol-launch&source=20190720_em_org_vol-launch") | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce09/3eb3e2fc/59f4f72c/744a5e75/1913296698/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://julianforthefuture.com/volunteer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20190720_em_org_vol-launch&source=20190720_em_org_vol-launch")
---

**Our biggest ask of you is to organize your own community.** We need you to build your own Team Julian! A team that can host events, spread the word and mobilize voters. We'll provide everything you need -- training, resources and a network of your fellow volunteers.
**You can start by planning a debate watch party!** Secretary Castro will debate Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Cory Booker, and six others on**Wednesday, July 31st**. When you sign up to join the team, [check out our resources on organizing your community](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fce09/3eb3e2fc/59f4f72c/744a5e74/1913296698/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://julianforthefuture.com/volunteer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+check+out+our+resources+on+organizing+yo&utm_campaign=20190720_em_org_vol-launch&source=20190720_em_org_vol-launch") to access a watch party guide, order a starter kit, and post your event.
**We also have an 'online virtual field office'** where we post projects daily that can be completed from the comfort of your own home! Plus, in our virtual field office, you can make connections with staff and other volunteers on Team Julian.
